title: AI identifies new particle models that may explain neutrinos' tiny mass
description: Physicists at the University of California, Irvine, have developed an artificial intelligence system that can autonomously design theoretical physics models, a task traditionally carried out by human theorists. The approach allows researchers to explore large, uncharted areas of particle physics theory, helping identify promising new explanations for the behavior of neutrinos.

content:

title: Fed's Warsh taps broad group of Fed outsiders to oversee review
description: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh tapped a broad and ​intellectually diverse group of economists and former central bankers to oversee the five task forces he is establishing to review the ‌U.S. central bank's operations, covering technical issues like management of its balance sheet as well as forward-leaning ones like the impact of artificial intelligence.

title: Meta aims to make its own chips as AI giants strive for independence from strained supply chain
description: Mark Zuckerberg's Meta plans to design its own artificial intelligence chips in-house starting in September – part of an industry-wide effort by the biggest names in AI to start making their own chips amid ongoing high demand.
content:

title: India must stay ahead in critical technologies like AI, says CEA Nageswaran
description: Chief Economic Advisor V Anantha Nageswaran stressed India's need to lead in critical technologies. He advocated for government and industry collaboration to harness artificial intelligence's potential. Nageswaran highlighted AI's dual capacity for both constructive and disruptive impacts on businesses. He emphasized that AI creates new job opportunities while transforming routine tasks. India must skill its population to actively shape and benefit from technological advancements.

title: Microsoft emissions surged 25% during data center boom
description: It's the latest technology company to report a setback in its efforts to erase emissions amid heavy spending on artificial intelligence data centers.
content:
